author: Vincent Voyer
subject: chore(dev): only use browser-sync, webpack HMR (algolia/react-instantsearch#1268)
body:
and remove weird plugins like assets, serve, watch. They are all buggy
in some ways.

We now have a decent dev env. Everything auto reloads in the best and
most efficient way.

While doing this, I am prety convinced there's not really a need to
use metalsmith. All the good tools have already decent programmatic
APIs that you need to combine to do a very custom website like this.
Using metalsmith is just harder because you have to find your way
through all the weirdness and code you don't own.

Reinvent the wheel, now!
